textByHash.23b9f67300db2ee50f526c7103e0f710055ffdca: Ah, Zanik. Would you like to see the results of my experiment with nature runes?
textByHash.23932a0acdfbc01116794e666821392b63c3ccca: Oh, yes. My research along those lines has been coming along very well. I think I could make a Moving-Over-Distance Sphere to anywhere you like, given a little work.
textByHash.17c789d74ff37d9c77e7e81845bf0966149a325b: Hmm. The Goblin Village, you say? Yes, I think I could do that. Just a moment.
textByHash.ef6df1b480b8bbd80ae3291707f9726d01084904: There you go. I've made you each one to get you to the Goblin Village and one to bring you back here.
textByHash.3c2c79b6dc691cd0479b14d60bc366aff6271840: Ah, Zanik. How did you get on at the Goblin Village?
textByHash.662197f43db7851f955c2ca8bfccf64aa8d96500: Remarkable! You must be a goblin from the surface, correct?
textByHash.f66c14d35a40db14d5ace542a855ab3f8efe451f: Yes, how do you know? Dorgeshuun scientists and philosophers generally believe that dreams are a way for the mind to sort through memories. There is no known mechanism by which they can predict the future.
textByHash.279d5bb208ff76a18bdfe5390f290b996e1493e0: I'm sorry, Grubfoot, but wanting something badly doesn't make it true.
textByHash.775a5cfa17daea5fa7b633810845fd27ca37e37f: If that is what is required to keep your temple safe, then I promise too.
textByHash.c311041d869a4d7d8860028f8ea668c03a51571b: Hmm... I've heard of a cave system to the west where many goblins live. That must be where this temple is hidden. I can make teleport spheres to take you there.
textByHash.9b2b9fac5e821037df037aed2b1ad86d5506d124: Oh, that's a pity. Just a minute...
textByHash.c69953c3c027a941d8f7928b42e4d42e0b78ac0f: Here, break this sphere on the ground. It will take you back to the Goblin Village.
textByHash.a0726307bf467d14d4b28f73111aec4fdd24c748: , Zanik, are you ready to leave?
textByHash.677a258eb141f51597a022c6d42773c02c34f835: Hello. What did you find in the Goblin Temple?
textByHash.9917b28d4de7cb5741f988d21cafbcd93cf225c8: Ah, well you'd better get back there then.
textByHash.ab7c3c71e0920202cbdf07a73039e8522244eea9: Hmm... that is an interesting problem. But I think there is a way to get you in.
textByHash.02f15c264fa39e8e90861dfcc77b9718fff8ebae: Yes, I think you can get into the temple, but not without being a goblin. I have been in correspondence with some of the wizards who live on the surface. I know of one who might be able to help you.
textByHash.c720493c7ba2caa96cdd65de66e1dfddfd9ca49a: They are known as the Makeover Mage. You should go and talk to them. I believe they live south west of the human city of Falador.
textByHash.1a71edfb95554c9efc02c3fefcf0e494a17a880d: I can, but I can't afford to keep doing it for free. If you get me two law runes and a piece of molten glass, I'll make a sphere to take you there.
textByHash.16101d92619bb4f629e43b58f8e1696b23177ae0: Hello. Did you speak to the Makeover Mage?
textByHash.dd62a613227959253442ffd7c89f9a820c6a8e60: You really should. I believe they live south west of the human city of Falador.
textByHash.79bf7fa096b3681392b01a21125db52fec837047: Hello. Any luck getting into the Goblin Temple?
textByHash.a168f6b56da3ea980a12344983d6cc89474b6149: Excellent! You'd better head back to the temple and try this potion out.
textByHash.6cfcc936727388901f728e6e92069e22558c4b4a: Hello. Have you discovered anything in the Goblin Temple?
textByHash.503d978c46ed07f258be332956ac0bebd9213567: Oh no! You'd better find a way to get her out!
textByHash.615fdafa76685ea23cb7b31fdfccfbb11cefc3bf: Hello. Have you found out anything about Yu'biusk yet?
textByHash.b2e2bdb76ca2bf957da8bec1146889d8aee46bf5: I'm sure you'll uncover something soon.
textByHash.7c541ec697cc2b116e4a9f60273ce2874716fbfc: Another plane? You mean goblins aren't native to Gielinor? That's remarkable. Think of the historical implications...
textByHash.ba06e42ad2053db3261fbe60a7fd50a407bce258: Yes... that sample you showed me had very similar properties to Law runes. I believe that the fungus ring could create an effect similar to my moving-over-distance spheres.
textByHash.d95c4583d33ac5fea7da372c2d0e6173d97f2a07: If the ring can create a moving-over-distance effect... then with enough power, we should be able to use it to break the planar barriers.
textByHash.0f1ca7a4c78b5509bb777f1a9dfc3a2004c46253: Then we just need goblin blood to call out to Yu'biusk!
textByHash.1228ac620008eb77510604644642ed123810887d: We should see if this works before we tell anyone else. Now, I think I can create some apparatus to provide power to the fungus ring.
textByHash.2adbaa37c906c609e202c8e81545976419eeb6d7: Come on, Zanik. , will you meet us by the fungus ring to the south of the city?
textByHash.23a42a369e32e01896e14ace448d9f67f9a9b19a: Ah. The machine is nearly ready. When I activate it, it will bombard the fungus ring with magical energy.
textByHash.8d4d51c4961ca8aded8157467fef07f707b0c63d: For this to work, we'll need to make sure the power is distributed correctly between the three circles of fungi. I need to handle the activation. , could you please handle the power distribution?
textByHash.d16a126f17fce515bd4d8108d9b9213dc60b1d38: The inner circle has a radius of one zurg, the middle circle has a radius of two zurgs, and the outer circle has a radius of three zurgs. You will need to distribute the power in proportion to the area of each circle.
textByHash.a44f148cd3a497540e4a02b6d586a62be1df89f5: Something must have gone wrong. This isn't what Grubfoot described.
textByHash.b728e5806318bb056ce3d7fb77fd358f567f725c: I don't understand. What happened here?
textByHash.c098c5cd31a3e2bf0f1e92f9bb2799fab20e7ba5: I'll stay here and keep an eye on the portal.
textByHash.0f0426224a583286c2dd12c222679d9dc624ffcd: You should have a look around and see if you can find out anything about this place. I'll stay here and keep an eye on the portal.
textByHash.a94fc8a2f667b069f294a4aabcafe60738eec541: . We should head back through the portal. Zanik is waiting on the other side.
textByHash.4653f7915d1aaac5a2bcaf759d4276530b964812: Don't go too far! I don't know how stable this portal is!
textByHash.3b6a67569365e8870b5f2fe8ebbc3aa0f3573828: The portal is closing! You've got to get back now!
textByHash.e2bbf78c9d240da28f2221e35c5229d6e6a13850: The portal... We have to go.
textByHash.b827569e6f95e3f6046c1011b3059ed415c738fd: We can only assume she's still in Yu'biusk somewhere. Problem is, I haven't been able to get the fungus ring machine working again.
textByHash.8aafb04d7de5e7bfd318aff9e01d69bd8f1fe58b: Perhaps not. Still, now that we've broken the planar barriers between Gielinor and Yu'biusk, maybe we've enabled some alternate methods of transport there.
textByHash.b0626904ad98f557ba519e40541d3a4ada696444: Those fungus rings would be a good starting point. Maybe you could use one of them to find another way to Yu'biusk. In the meantime, I'll keep trying to get the machine working again.
textByHash.b6b858b8f2421134b1e2ca4a964459ffcaf5b2cd: You did? Did you find anything there? Was there any trace of Zanik?
textByHash.0fae085c770789d97d5aee70dceb5ec742fcd109: Then it's just as I feared. It seems that whatever's happened to Zanik, wherever she is... she's on her own.
textByHash.4bd890dec4f4427c912a62197545ba5104fcd92d: Oh, hello! I was just trying to discover the properties of these magical stones you call 'runes', and trying to make some devices to harness their power.
textByHash.9e76bc4c3ee2bc658389dcd3a2cb673c3ccca1c8: Oh, it's terribly exciting! Let me explain...
textByHash.0ef39c3dbecac269aa109f7ba719ec1b9bfac94e: The only thing I've been able to make so far is this. I call it the moving-over-distance sphere.
textByHash.f991d0d9e33bd10af4c91c5361408532811eadb4: Well, I was experimenting with these blue runes, the ones you call 'law' runes. They have a strange property of being able to move instantly from one place to another.
textByHash.cf50892376a66d4cf4e481a2492537fe3cc84fdb: I know; I couldn't believe it either!
textByHash.937351f6db39d89e673d9808a4d8923aaac8d546: I found that whenever I prepared powdered law runes in a certain way and then threw them on the ground, I would appear somewhere else in the city.
textByHash.f3473be2a0d2bab1d6f75c84c0076826e01b2347: I asked Zanik to test it, and she said that wherever she was in the caves, even if she went to the surface, whenever she smashed the sphere on the ground she would appear back in the city!
textByHash.6ff9128221647c75430f28756c16a2d0d9ce8889: I can see how it might be useful, but I wish I knew more about how it worked...
textByHash.5251cb682963874389fd176838a50aa8ffd42e9d: Oh, I can make one for you if you like. You'll need to give me two law runes and a piece of molten glass.
textByHash.d6685d7c830ac6f38c99c88c251a444cf9ab053d: Oh, er, goodbye. Now, where was I...
textByHash.38d7837c50405b4df88209240df89114293835f6: Where do you want a sphere to?
textByHash.70ab137464d5dcc87008b16e85d074de9869644f: You'll need to get me two law runes and a piece of molten glass.
textByHash.836e67e3978a46ec0230c5a1ab33e2fb702069ac: You're quite welcome! Now, where was I...
textByHash.c918f064b216072678c22a7a5befbfc0049d9fba: Excellent! I can make you moving-over-distance spheres with them! How many do you want?
textByHash.d052b0fd509210b3115a698be6b58f29e5751f23: Ah! I was wrong about it all along!
textByHash.0c670590efb2e2f8e5969d130ba1dc99779ca1aa: Oh! Zanik! It's fascinating. These 'runes' store a type of energy I've never encountered before.
textByHash.b338da9b43734f42d5649ef56fe53f94381b580e: Yes. Each type of rune has its power tuned to a different effect, but they are all essentially the same energy.
textByHash.a88a8dc89ea3222bcd8d34291f212c3da7a1ff90: What I want to know is where this energy came from. The stone that these runes were cut from must be infused with an enormous amount of raw magical energy, but where did that energy come from?
